calendar.matters:
MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Jan-18-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.
Defendant SOSA GRANITE & MARBLE INC.'S motion to compel further responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. Plaintiff is ordered to serve further verified responses and produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order. The Court finds that plaintiff asserted objections that had previously been waived and failed to meet and confer. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $850 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-20-2006 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-16-2006 Continued To Aug-04-06 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
